catalog.shortDescription: Observe your realm. Track holders, snapshots, and activity across your assets.
catalog.longDescription: Watchtower monitors your on-chain assets and feeds data into your guild systems. Use it to power conditions, automate roles, and drive decisions.

docs.overview: Watchtower is your data engine. It tracks blockchain activity and transforms it into usable conditions across your guild.
docs.mechanics:
Tracks per mint: Current holders, Daily snapshots, Transactions (planned)

Feeds into: Discord roles, Shipments, Gates logic
docs.setup:
Add mints in Admin

Enable tracking type

Use data in conditions
docs.pricing:
Current holders → ~5 USDC / mint / month (tiered down at scale)
Snapshots → 5 USDC / mint / month
Transactions → 20 USDC / mint / month

activationInstructions.intro: Enable tracking for mints in your address book.
steps: Add mints in Admin > Address Book
Enable Current holders, Snapshot, or Transactions per mint in Watchtower
Configure Conditionsets with up to 10 conditions
Weighted token holdings are available with snapshots
activationInstructions.note: The Watch powers conditions for shipments and Discord roles. Enable it for mints used in those features.
